name: sentira
description: Sentira — camera-free elder monitoring built on RuView WiFi CSI sensing. Supplemental alert layer, not a medical device.

scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d
scripts.local:up: docker compose up -d mosquitto && pnpm --parallel --stream -r run dev
scripts.local:down: docker compose down && pnpm -r exec echo 'stopped'
